/usr/bin/c++  -O2 -flto=auto -ffat-lto-objects -fexceptions -g -grecord-gcc-switches -pipe -specs=/usr/lib/rpm/redhat/redhat-hardened-cc1 -fstack-protector-strong -specs=/usr/lib/rpm/redhat/redhat-annobin-cc1  -m64 -march=x86-64 -mtune=generic -fasynchronous-unwind-tables -fstack-clash-protection -fcf-protection -mtls-dialect=gnu2 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -pipe -fsigned-char -fsized-deallocation -pthread -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/startG4.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/startG4.dir/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/startG4.dir/src/ActionInitialization.cc.o CMakeFiles/startG4.dir/src/DetectorConstruction.cc.o CMakeFiles/startG4.dir/src/EventAction.cc.o CMakeFiles/startG4.dir/src/MyMaterials.cc.o CMakeFiles/startG4.dir/src/TargetHit.cc.o CMakeFiles/startG4.dir/src/TargetSD.cc.o -o startG4   -L/usr/lib64/root  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib64/root:/home/angel/Software/geant4-install/lib64
